steps.title: Complete the squares
steps.content:
Move the constant and complete the square for both variables.
$$x^2-14x+y^2-12y=84$$
$$(x-7)^2+(y-6)^2=84+49+36=169$$

steps.title: Find the square perimeter
steps.content: The circle has radius $13$, so its diameter is $26$. An inscribed circle has diameter equal to the square's side length. $$4(26)=104$$ The answer is C.
